body:
## What & why

The launch branch was identical to `main`, and `main`'s CI was **not clean**
(latest runs `cancelled` / `failure`). I traced the root causes and fixed every
failure in the **doctrine / governance perimeter** — the 11 non-negotiables that
are enforced in code — plus one real frontend endpoint drift. **No guard was
disabled**; only compliant-context references were allowlisted.

### Doctrine-guard fixes
| Guard | Root cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| `test_landing_forbidden_claims` / `test_v7_no_guaranteed_claims` | 15 landing pages carry the **mandatory bilingual value disclaimer** ("Estimated outcomes are not guaranteed outcomes / النتائج التقديرية ليست نتائج مضمونة") and policy-negation copy ("صفر cold WhatsApp", "لا scraping") but were never allowlisted | Per-file allowlist entries under a new `DISCLAIMER` reason code; removed one **stale** `نضمن` entry (trust-center was redesigned) |
| `test_no_linkedin_<token>_string_anywhere` | A test-inventory doc names the guard test itself | Allowlisted the doc path |
| `test_v7_secret_leakage_guard` | 35 files reference the live-secret/PAT/Google-API-key **prefixes** in secret-scan regexes, redaction modules, prefix `.startswith` checks, env placeholders and runbooks — verified line-by-line, **no real secrets** | Allowlisted all 35 with one-line reasons |

### Real frontend fix
`architecture.html`, `launch-status.html`, `system-status.html` used the legacy
`/healthz` alias. Migrated to the canonical `/health` (liveness) and
`/health/deep` (dependency check) routes — both real and schema-included.
Verified live via the in-process API smoke (`/health` → 200).

## Verification (run locally)
- **Doctrine-guard battery: 137 passed**, 1 skipped (env), 1 xfail (tracked debt)
- `check_alembic_single_head` ✅ · `verify_service_readiness_matrix` ✅ · `export_service_readiness_json` (no diff) ✅ · `seo_audit` (no diff) ✅ · `security_smoke` ✅ · `check_env_contract` ✅ · `smoke_inprocess` ✅ (API boots; `/health` 200)
- Full suite `-n auto`: **4628 / 4726 passed**

## Honest residual state (pre-existing on `main`, not a regression here)
Documented in `docs/ops/LAUNCH_READINESS_EXECUTION_2026_06_06.md`:
- **~33** parallel-isolation flakiness (e.g. all 22 `test_hermes_system` pass serially) → test-infra debt; the real reason CI shows `cancelled`
- **~20** environment-gated (`ConnectionRefusedError 127.0.0.1:5432` — no Postgres in sandbox) → pass in CI
- **5** shell-verifier meta-tests (working-tree sensitive)
- **~9** real drift needing a **product decision** — notably the billing free-tier (`amount_halalas == 0` for the rung-0 Free Diagnostic vs. the "all plans positive" money-safety invariant). Several touch money & safety, so I did **not** guess unilaterally.

## Founder-only external launch steps
Cannot be done from the repo (doctrine: never charge a customer, never send
external without approval, Moyasar live is founder-flipped only): production
secrets, DNS/TLS, Moyasar KYC + live cutover, payment dashboards, warm-list fill.
Tracked as #467–#471 — see the report §4.

---
🤖 Draft PR opened automatically after push.

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01KSVkpyvSg5YUmKqdZcC6L7)_

commits.messageBody:
…th endpoint

Branch was identical to main and main's CI was not clean. Fixed all
failures in the doctrine / governance perimeter (the 11 non-negotiables
enforced in code), plus one real frontend endpoint drift. No guard was
disabled — only compliant-context references were allowlisted.

- forbidden-claims guard: allowlist the mandatory bilingual value
  disclaimer (guaranteed/مضمون) + policy-negation copy (cold/scraping)
  across 15 landing pages via a new DISCLAIMER reason code; drop one
  stale نضمن entry (trust-center was redesigned)
- linkedin-token guard: allowlist the test-inventory doc that names the
  guard test itself
- secret-prefix guard: allowlist 35 files that reference the
  live-secret/PAT/Google-API-key prefixes in secret-scan regexes,
  redaction modules, .startswith checks, placeholders and runbooks
  (verified line-by-line — no real secrets)
- landing: migrate architecture/launch-status/system-status pages off the
  legacy /healthz alias to the canonical /health + /health/deep routes
  (both real and schema-included; verified via in-process API smoke)
- docs: add an honest launch-readiness execution report with the full,
  categorized test-suite triage and the founder-only external steps

Doctrine-guard battery: 137 passed, 1 skipped (env), 1 xfail (tracked).

title: fix(launch): green the doctrine/governance CI gates + canonical /health endpoint
